docket_entries.description: HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIANG, HERO HEARING SET FOR JUN-10-2015 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIANG, HERO SERVED APR-13-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, ALAN

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-10-2015 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF HERO CHIAG'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF CHIANG, HERO

OTHER NON EXEMPT COMPLAINTS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PETITIONER CHIANG, HERO AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, ALAN SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-12-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-11-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-20-2015
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-12-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIANG, HERO
